title: Nalbana Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Nalbana Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Odisha

overview.short: Nalbana Bird Sanctuary or Nalbana Island is the core area of the Ramsar designated wetlands of Chilika Lake.
overview.description: Nalbana Bird Sanctuary or Nalbana Island is the core area of the Ramsar designated wetlands of Chilika Lake. It was declared a bird sanctuary under the Wildlife Protection Act in 1972. In the heart of the park, one can see thousands of birds descending during the migratory season. The island disappears during monsoon season due to inundation only to emerge again in post-monsoon.

topPlaces.name: Chilika Lake
topPlaces.description: Chilika Lake is the largest brackish water lagoon with estuarine characteristics along the east coast of Indian sub-continent in Asia and second largest coastal lagoon in the world, its area ranges from about 900 to 11,165 sq km during summers and monsoon respectively. It is spread over the Puri, Khordha and Ganjam districts of Odisha state on the east coast of India, at the mouth of the Daya River, flowing into the Bay of Bengal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nalbana Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nalbana Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nalbana Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nalbana Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nalbana Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nalbana Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Nalbana Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nalbana Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chilika Lake.
